title: Fix settings selector background alignment in console
description: Fix misaligned background/highlight in settings selectors (mode/motion/typeface). Ensure main selector and settings selectors share correct alignment without vertical distribution hacks. Revert problematic change and adjust selector layout/measurements. AC: settings selector background aligns with text; highlight sits correctly; main selector unchanged.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Adjusted settings selectors to use shared AnimatedSelector alignment: removed highlightOffsetY overrides and flex-wrap so settings uses default highlight offset/height like main.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Reverted settings layout distribution by switching settings content wrapper to flex column (no grid stretch). Now uses flex-col gap-3 with min-h-0 to keep controls aligned at top while still scrollable.

custom.beads_notes: Closed: selectors aligned; settings panel layout fixed.
